summary: tail resolves the real /api/v1/<resource>.json path via syncResourcePath() and validates the resource up front.
reason: Generated tail built the path as '/'+resource, hitting the RideWithGPS web HTML page instead of the JSON API (invalid JSON, exit 0 on bad resource). RideWithGPS API paths require the /api/v1 prefix and .json suffix.
validated_outcome: Live dogfood: tail --resource routes returns valid NDJSON; tail <unknown> exits non-zero. 136/136.
